desc: Prime 568 sq.ft. second-floor office space near two Holmdel shopping centers. Ideal for professional office. Available immediately.
description:
Prime 568 sq.ft. second-floor office space in a well-located Holmdel professional building, situated near two major shopping centers for excellent visibility and foot traffic.

Ideal for a professional office use — attorneys, accountants, insurance, financial services, and similar tenants. Clean, bright space available immediately. NNN lease structure.
